MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAYBROOK GRADUATE SCHOOL AND RESEARCH CENTER Notice of Hearing on Petition for an Order to Arbitrate and for Dismissal or, Stay of Action Pending Arbitration. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition for an order to arbitrate granted. Civil action stayed pending arbitration.
